steps.title: Check the trend direction
steps.content: The scatterplot rises from left to right, so the linear model should have a positive slope. This eliminates the choices with slope $-0.9$.

steps.title: Check the intercept
steps.content: The remaining model has positive slope $0.9$ and a positive $y$-intercept near $2.2$, which matches the plotted trend. The answer is D.
